world.title: EU court says Hungary's anti-LGBTQ rules breach law
world.description: BRUSSELS, April 21 (Reuters) - ⁠Hungary's outgoing government violated European law ⁠with rules prohibiting or restricting access to ‌LGBTQ content, which stigmatise and marginalise gay and trans people, the European Court of Justice ruled on ​Tuesday.

science.title: Curiosity Rover Uncovers Unseen Organic Compounds on Mars
science.description: NASA's Curiosity rover has identified more organic compounds on Mars, providing crucial insights into the planet's potential to harbor life. While not definitively proving past life, the rover's findings support the notion that Mars was once a habitable world, with organic structures that could be precursors to life.
